title: [FR] Help
description: [FR] Find guides, tutorials, and answers to help you get the most out of doseo.
noResults: [FR] No articles found matching your search.
tourWelcomeContent: [FR] This is your SEO monitoring dashboard. Let us show you around!
tourAddDomainContent: [FR] Start by adding a domain to monitor. Click here to add your first website.
tourAddKeywordsContent: [FR] Add the keywords you want to track. You can add them manually or use AI suggestions.
tourViewPositionsContent: [FR] Track your keyword positions over time. See rankings, changes, and trends.
tourCheckCompetitorsContent: [FR] Add competitors to compare their rankings with yours across all your keywords.
tourReportsNavContent: [FR] Access your reports section from the navigation menu.
tourGenerateReportContent: [FR] Create comprehensive SEO reports with customizable sections.
tourCustomizeReportContent: [FR] Choose which sections to include and customize the report appearance.
tourExportReportContent: [FR] Export reports as PDF, CSV, or share them with clients via a link.
tourOrgSettingsContent: [FR] Manage your organization details, billing, and subscription plan.
tourBrandingContent: [FR] Upload your logo and customize the appearance of shared reports.
tourTeamContent: [FR] Invite team members and manage their roles and permissions.
tourNotificationsContent: [FR] Configure which notifications you receive and how often.
